results.pred_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_users FROM identity.users

SELECT COUNT(*) AS active_product_count
FROM catalog.products
WHERE status = 'active'
SELECT code FROM geo.currencies

SELECT COUNT(*) AS refunded_orders_count
FROM sales.orders
WHERE status = 'refunded'

SELECT AVG(grand_total) AS average_grand_total
FROM sales.orders

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM support.tickets 
WHERE priority = 'urgent'
SELECT DISTINCT status FROM sales.orders

SELECT SUM(amount) AS total_captured_amount
FROM billing.payments
WHERE status = 'captured'

SELECT COUNT(*) AS archived_product_count
FROM catalog.products
WHERE status = 'archived'

SELECT COUNT(*) AS active_subscriptions_count
FROM billing.subscriptions
WHERE status = 'active'

SELECT COUNT(*) AS european_country_count
FROM geo.countries
WHERE continent = 'Europe'

SELECT AVG(employee_count) AS average_employee_count
FROM crm.accounts
SELECT 'insufficient schema: missing sign-up information' AS error

SELECT COUNT(*) AS open_tickets_count
FROM support.tickets
WHERE status IN ('new', 'open', 'pending', 'on_hold')

SELECT COUNT(*) AS overdue_invoices_count
FROM billing.invoices
WHERE status = 'past_due'

SELECT 
  catalog.products.name AS product_name,
  catalog.brands.name AS brand_name
FROM 
  catalog.products
INNER JOIN 
  catalog.brands ON catalog.products.brand_id = catalog.brands.id

SELECT 
  product_reviews.title,
  product_reviews.body,
  product_reviews.rating,
  products.name AS product_name
FROM 
  catalog.product_reviews
INNER JOIN 
  catalog.products ON product_reviews.product_id = products.id

SELECT billing.subscriptions.public_id, billing.plans.name
FROM billing.subscriptions
INNER JOIN billing.plans ON billing.subscriptions.plan_id = billing.plans.id

SELECT orders.order_number, users.email
FROM sales.orders
INNER JOIN identity.users ON orders.user_id = users.id

SELECT p.name
FROM catalog.products p
LEFT JOIN catalog.product_reviews r ON p.id = r.product_id
WHERE r.id IS NULL

SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM billing.subscriptions AS s
INNER JOIN billing.plans AS p ON s.plan_id = p.id
WHERE s.status = 'active' AND p.code = 'pro'

SELECT
  o.currency_code,
  SUM(o.grand_total) AS total_revenue
FROM
  sales.orders o
GROUP BY
  o.currency_code

SELECT
  o.tenant_id,
  COUNT(o.id) AS order_count
FROM
  sales.orders o
GROUP BY
  o.tenant_id

SELECT p.name
FROM catalog.products p
JOIN catalog.product_reviews r ON p.id = r.product_id
GROUP BY p.id, p.name
HAVING AVG(r.rating) > 4

SELECT u.id, u.public_id, u.email, u.full_name
FROM identity.users u
JOIN sales.orders o ON u.id = o.user_id
GROUP BY u.id, u.public_id, u.email, u.full_name
HAVING COUNT(o.id) > 3

SELECT
  countries.name AS country_name,
  SUM(orders.grand_total) AS total_revenue
FROM
  sales.orders
INNER JOIN geo.addresses ON orders.shipping_address_id = addresses.id
INNER JOIN geo.countries ON addresses.country_id = countries.id
GROUP BY
  countries.name

SELECT pv.name, SUM(oi.quantity) AS total_units_sold
FROM sales.order_items oi
INNER JOIN catalog.product_variants pv ON oi.product_variant_id = pv.id
GROUP BY pv.name
ORDER BY total_units_sold DESC
LIMIT 5

SELECT DISTINCT identity.users.email
FROM billing.payment_refunds
INNER JOIN billing.payments ON billing.payment_refunds.payment_id = billing.payments.id
INNER JOIN identity.users ON billing.payments.tenant_id = identity.users.tenant_id

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT a.user_id) AS user_count
FROM geo.addresses a
JOIN geo.countries c ON a.country_id = c.id
WHERE c.name = 'Germany' AND a.user_id IS NOT NULL

SELECT p.code AS plan_code, COUNT(s.id) AS active_subscriptions_count
FROM billing.subscriptions s
INNER JOIN billing.plans p ON s.plan_id = p.id
WHERE s.status = 'active'
GROUP BY p.code

SELECT
  DATE_TRUNC('month', placed_at) AS month,
  COUNT(*) AS order_count
FROM
  sales.orders
WHERE
  placed_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '12 months'
GROUP BY
  month
ORDER BY
  month

SELECT 
    t.name, 
    SUM(o.grand_total) AS total_revenue
FROM 
    identity.tenants t
INNER JOIN 
    sales.orders o ON t.id = o.tenant_id
GROUP BY 
    t.name
ORDER BY 
    total_revenue DESC

SELECT AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (resolved_at - created_at)) / 86400) AS average_days_to_resolve
FROM support.tickets
WHERE resolved_at IS NOT NULL

SELECT COUNT(*) AS order_count
FROM sales.orders o
INNER JOIN identity.users u ON o.user_id = u.id
WHERE o.tenant_id = u.tenant_id

SELECT c.name, COUNT(pc.product_id) AS product_count
FROM catalog.categories c
JOIN catalog.product_categories pc ON c.id = pc.category_id
GROUP BY c.id, c.name
ORDER BY product_count DESC
LIMIT 3

SELECT SUM(o.grand_total) AS total_revenue_eur
FROM sales.orders o
WHERE o.currency_code = 'EUR'

SELECT 
  (COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'cancelled' THEN 1 END)::decimal / COUNT(*)) AS cancelled_fraction
FROM sales.orders

SELECT name
FROM crm.accounts
WHERE employee_count > 100

SELECT
    bp.name AS plan_name,
    AVG(o.grand_total) AS average_order_value
FROM
    billing.subscriptions AS s
INNER JOIN
    billing.plans AS bp ON s.plan_id = bp.id
INNER JOIN
    sales.orders AS o ON s.user_id = o.user_id AND s.tenant_id = o.tenant_id
GROUP BY
    bp.name

SELECT 
  invoices.status, 
  COUNT(*) AS paid_invoices_count
FROM 
  billing.invoices
WHERE 
  invoices.status = 'paid'
GROUP BY 
  invoices.status

SELECT COUNT(*) AS bounced_sessions_count
FROM analytics.web_sessions
WHERE is_bounce = TRUE

SELECT COUNT(*) AS active_coupons_count
FROM pricing.coupons
WHERE status = 'active'

SELECT SUM(billing.payment_refunds.amount) AS total_successful_refunds
FROM billing.payment_refunds
WHERE billing.payment_refunds.status = 'succeeded'

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM audit.audit_log 
WHERE action = 'delete'

SELECT AVG(score) AS average_csat_score
FROM support.csat_responses

SELECT COUNT(*) AS won_opportunities_count
FROM crm.opportunities
WHERE is_won = TRUE

SELECT COUNT(*) AS churned_subscriptions_count
FROM billing.subscriptions
WHERE status = 'canceled'

SELECT COUNT(*) AS marketing_blasts_sent
FROM marketing.campaigns
WHERE status = 'sent'

SELECT COUNT(*) AS goods_out_movements_count
FROM inventory.stock_movements
WHERE kind = 'shipment'

SELECT COUNT(*) AS converted_leads_count
FROM crm.leads
WHERE status = 'converted'

SELECT COUNT(*) AS failed_webhook_callbacks
FROM comms.webhook_deliveries
WHERE status = 'failed'

SELECT status, COUNT(*) AS notification_count
FROM comms.notifications
GROUP BY status

SELECT action, COUNT(*) AS count
FROM audit.audit_log
GROUP BY action

SELECT
  DATE_TRUNC('month', occurred_at) AS month,
  COUNT(*) AS event_count
FROM
  analytics.events
GROUP BY
  DATE_TRUNC('month', occurred_at)
ORDER BY
  month

SELECT jr.status, COUNT(*) AS failed_count
FROM ops.job_runs jr
WHERE jr.status = 'failed'
GROUP BY jr.status

SELECT 
  (COUNT(CASE WHEN cm.status = 'bounced' THEN 1 END)::decimal / COUNT(*)::decimal) AS bounce_fraction
FROM 
  marketing.campaign_messages cm

SELECT 
  i.currency_code, 
  SUM(i.total) AS total_invoiced_amount
FROM 
  billing.invoices i
GROUP BY 
  i.currency_code

SELECT 
    tenant_id, 
    COUNT(*) AS open_opportunities_count
FROM 
    crm.opportunities
WHERE 
    is_closed = FALSE
GROUP BY 
    tenant_id

SELECT 
  comms.notifications.title, 
  comms.notifications.body, 
  identity.users.email
FROM 
  comms.notifications
INNER JOIN 
  identity.users 
ON 
  comms.notifications.user_id = identity.users.id

SELECT 
  opportunities.name AS opportunity_name,
  pipelines.name AS pipeline_name
FROM 
  crm.opportunities
INNER JOIN 
  crm.pipelines ON opportunities.pipeline_id = pipelines.id

SELECT COUNT(*) AS refund_count
FROM billing.payment_refunds AS pr
INNER JOIN billing.payments AS p ON pr.payment_id = p.id
WHERE p.status = 'captured'

SELECT c.id, c.code
FROM pricing.coupons c
LEFT JOIN pricing.coupon_redemptions cr ON c.id = cr.coupon_id
WHERE cr.id IS NULL

SELECT
  c.code,
  SUM(cr.discount_amount) AS total_redeemed_discount
FROM
  pricing.coupon_redemptions cr
INNER JOIN
  pricing.coupons c ON cr.coupon_id = c.id
GROUP BY
  c.code

SELECT
  csat.rated_agent_id AS agent_id,
  AVG(csat.score) AS average_score
FROM
  support.csat_responses csat
GROUP BY
  csat.rated_agent_id
HAVING
  AVG(csat.score) < 3

SELECT c.name, COUNT(cm.id) AS message_count
FROM marketing.campaigns c
INNER JOIN marketing.campaign_messages cm ON c.id = cm.campaign_id
GROUP BY c.name
HAVING COUNT(cm.id) > 100

SELECT 
    p.name AS pipeline_name, 
    COUNT(o.id) AS won_opportunities_count
FROM 
    crm.pipelines p
INNER JOIN 
    crm.opportunities o ON p.id = o.pipeline_id
WHERE 
    o.is_won = TRUE
GROUP BY 
    p.name
ORDER BY 
    won_opportunities_count DESC

SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('month', occurred_at) AS month,
    SUM(CASE WHEN direction = 'debit' THEN amount ELSE -amount END) AS net_debit_total
FROM
    billing.ledger_entries
GROUP BY
    DATE_TRUNC('month', occurred_at)
ORDER BY
    month

SELECT event_name, COUNT(*) AS event_count
FROM analytics.events
GROUP BY event_name
ORDER BY event_count DESC
LIMIT 5

SELECT 
  sa.display_name, 
  AVG(cr.score) AS average_csat_score
FROM 
  support.csat_responses cr
INNER JOIN 
  support.support_agents sa ON cr.rated_agent_id = sa.id
GROUP BY 
  sa.display_name

SELECT w.name AS warehouse_name, COUNT(sm.id) AS stock_movement_count
FROM inventory.stock_movements sm
INNER JOIN inventory.stock_locations sl ON sm.stock_location_id = sl.id
INNER JOIN inventory.warehouses w ON sl.warehouse_id = w.id
GROUP BY w.name

SELECT DISTINCT u.email
FROM identity.users u
INNER JOIN marketing.campaign_messages cm ON u.id = cm.user_id
LEFT JOIN sales.orders o ON u.id = o.user_id
WHERE cm.status = 'opened' AND o.id IS NULL

SELECT
    bp.code AS plan_code,
    SUM(i.total) AS total_invoiced_amount
FROM
    billing.invoices i
INNER JOIN
    billing.subscriptions s ON i.subscription_id = s.id
INNER JOIN
    billing.plans bp ON s.plan_id = bp.id
WHERE
    i.status = 'paid'
GROUP BY
    bp.code

SELECT
  countries.name AS country_name,
  SUM(payments.amount_refunded) AS total_refunded_amount
FROM
  billing.payments
INNER JOIN
  sales.orders ON payments.order_id = orders.id
INNER JOIN
  geo.addresses ON orders.shipping_address_id = addresses.id
INNER JOIN
  geo.countries ON addresses.country_id = countries.id
GROUP BY
  countries.name

SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM comms.notifications n
INNER JOIN identity.users u ON n.user_id = u.id
WHERE n.tenant_id = u.tenant_id

SELECT DISTINCT identity.users.email
FROM billing.subscriptions
INNER JOIN billing.plans ON billing.subscriptions.plan_id = billing.plans.id
INNER JOIN support.tickets ON billing.subscriptions.user_id = support.tickets.requester_user_id
INNER JOIN identity.users ON billing.subscriptions.user_id = identity.users.id
WHERE billing.subscriptions.status = 'active'
  AND billing.plans.code = 'enterprise'

SELECT COUNT(*) AS abandoned_baskets_count
FROM sales.carts
WHERE status = 'abandoned'

SELECT COUNT(*) AS delivered_fulfillments_count
FROM sales.fulfillments
WHERE status = 'delivered'

SELECT COUNT(*) AS active_product_variants_count
FROM catalog.product_variants
WHERE is_active = TRUE

SELECT COUNT(*) AS fully_received_count
FROM inventory.purchase_orders
WHERE status = 'received'

SELECT COUNT(*) AS rejected_attempts
FROM identity.login_attempts
WHERE succeeded = FALSE

SELECT COUNT(*) AS green_lit_returns
FROM sales.returns
WHERE status IN ('approved', 'received', 'refunded')

SELECT COUNT(*) AS failed_transactional_emails
FROM marketing.campaign_messages
WHERE status = 'failed'

SELECT AVG(duration_seconds) AS average_duration_seconds
FROM analytics.page_views

SELECT 
  payments.gateway, 
  SUM(payments.amount) AS total_captured_amount
FROM 
  billing.payments
WHERE 
  payments.status = 'captured'
GROUP BY 
  payments.gateway

SELECT status, COUNT(*) AS order_count
FROM sales.orders
GROUP BY status

SELECT 
  EXTRACT(HOUR FROM occurred_at) AS hour_of_day, 
  COUNT(*) AS event_count
FROM 
  analytics.events
GROUP BY 
  hour_of_day
ORDER BY 
  event_count DESC
LIMIT 1

SELECT 
  (SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'success' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)::decimal / COUNT(*)) AS success_fraction
FROM 
  comms.email_log

SELECT tm.ticket_id, COUNT(tm.id) AS message_count
FROM support.ticket_messages tm
GROUP BY tm.ticket_id
HAVING COUNT(tm.id) >= 8

SELECT
  order_id,
  SUM(line_total) AS total_line_value
FROM
  sales.order_items
GROUP BY
  order_id
ORDER BY
  total_line_value DESC
LIMIT 10

SELECT 
    shipments.tracking_number, 
    orders.order_number
FROM 
    sales.shipments
INNER JOIN 
    sales.fulfillments ON shipments.fulfillment_id = fulfillments.id
INNER JOIN 
    sales.orders ON fulfillments.order_id = orders.id
WHERE 
    shipments.delivered_at IS NOT NULL

SELECT 
  crm.contacts.first_name,
  crm.contacts.last_name,
  crm.accounts.name AS account_name
FROM 
  crm.contacts
INNER JOIN 
  crm.accounts ON crm.contacts.account_id = crm.accounts.id

SELECT pm.kind, COUNT(p.id) AS captured_payments_count
FROM billing.payments p
INNER JOIN billing.payment_methods pm ON p.payment_method_id = pm.id
WHERE p.status = 'captured'
GROUP BY pm.kind

SELECT 
    b.name AS brand_name, 
    SUM(oi.quantity) AS total_quantity_sold
FROM 
    sales.order_items oi
INNER JOIN 
    catalog.product_variants pv ON oi.product_variant_id = pv.id
INNER JOIN 
    catalog.products p ON pv.product_id = p.id
INNER JOIN 
    catalog.brands b ON p.brand_id = b.id
GROUP BY 
    b.name

SELECT 
    w.name, 
    COUNT(f.id) AS fulfillment_count
FROM 
    sales.fulfillments f
INNER JOIN 
    inventory.warehouses w ON f.warehouse_id = w.id
WHERE 
    f.status IN ('shipped', 'delivered')
GROUP BY 
    w.name
ORDER BY 
    fulfillment_count DESC
LIMIT 5

SELECT
  pr.currency_code,
  SUM(pr.amount) AS total_succeeded_refund_amount
FROM
  billing.payment_refunds pr
WHERE
  pr.status = 'succeeded'
GROUP BY
  pr.currency_code

SELECT
  o.user_id,
  o.placed_at,
  o.grand_total,
  SUM(o.grand_total) OVER (PARTITION BY o.user_id ORDER BY o.placed_at) AS running_total
FROM
  sales.orders o
ORDER BY
  o.user_id,
  o.placed_at
LIMIT 50

SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('month', o.created_at) AS month,
    COUNT(o.id) AS order_count,
    COUNT(o.id) - LAG(COUNT(o.id)) OVER (ORDER BY DATE_TRUNC('month', o.created_at)) AS change_from_previous_month
FROM
    sales.orders o
GROUP BY
    DATE_TRUNC('month', o.created_at)
ORDER BY
    month

SELECT 
    o.owner_user_id, 
    COUNT(d.id) AS won_deals_count
FROM 
    crm.deals d
INNER JOIN 
    crm.opportunities o ON d.opportunity_id = o.id
WHERE 
    o.is_won = TRUE
GROUP BY 
    o.owner_user_id
ORDER BY 
    won_deals_count DESC
LIMIT 5

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT u.id) AS users_without_successful_signin
FROM identity.users u
LEFT JOIN identity.login_attempts la ON u.id = la.user_id AND la.succeeded = TRUE
WHERE la.id IS NULL

SELECT p.name, COUNT(pr.id) AS approved_review_count
FROM catalog.products p
INNER JOIN catalog.product_reviews pr ON p.id = pr.product_id
WHERE pr.is_approved = TRUE
GROUP BY p.id
ORDER BY approved_review_count DESC
LIMIT 10
